properties.name: Ballyarnett Country Park
properties.description: A sprawling green space with a great playground and historic features. Perfect for a family walk or a picnic on a sunny day.

properties.name: Limavady Accessible Play Park
properties.description: A fantastic, modern, and fully inclusive playground designed so that children of all abilities can play together.

properties.name: Diversity Park
properties.description: Located at Flowerfield Arts Centre, this is a brilliant inclusive play area with equipment for all ages and abilities.

properties.name: Claudy Country Park
properties.description: A peaceful spot with lovely riverside walks and a woodland trail that kids will love exploring.

properties.name: Ness Country Park
properties.description: Home to the highest waterfall in Northern Ireland! It offers dramatic woodland walks and plenty of steps to tire out little legs.

properties.name: Ballyronan Marina
properties.description: A beautiful setting on the shores of Lough Neagh with a great playground, forest trail, and picnic areas.

properties.name: Iniscarn Forest & Park
properties.description: A hidden gem for forest walks and getting back to nature. Great for older kids who love to explore and build dens.
